hero.title: The Finest Taste
hero.subtitle: Because Every Meal Deserves the Best
hero.description: Al RAKY Food Industries delivers premium quality food products for your daily needs with world-class standards.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A Legacy of Excellence Since 1951
about.description: Al RAKY Food Industries was founded in 1951 by the late Kamel Zakaria Durgham in Kafar Sousseh, Damascus, Syria. In 1983, a branch was opened in Turkey. Today, the company owns a 15,000 m² factory in Damascus and a factory in Hatay, Turkey, both equipped with state-of-the-art technology.
about.missionText: Deliver high-quality food products — jams, pickles, olive oil, tomato paste, makdous, pomegranate molasses, and blossom water — meeting the needs of Arab and global families.
about.visionText: To remain one of Syria's largest food industry companies, exporting our products to Arab countries, Africa, Europe, the Americas, and Australia.
about.valueQualityDesc: We never compromise on quality at any stage of production
about.valueTrustDesc: 75 years of building trust with our customers and partners
about.valueInnovationDesc: We continuously develop our products to meet market needs
